features: Enhance your child's oral hygiene routine with this Beauty Formulas kids quick rinse Mouthwash
Designed for children over 6 years old
The Mouthwash contains fluoride for natural protection against cavities
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Active oral care kids quick rinse Mouthwash is designed for children over 6 years old. The fluid enhances the enamel, protects against plaque formation and refreshes the breath. It effectively protects the teeth and prevents periodontal and gum disease in children. Directions Pour a small amount of mouthwash into a cup, rinse around in the mouth for a few seconds, then spit out Safety Warning Do not swallow, Avoid contact with eyes, If ingested, seek medical attention immediately See more
